# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the **Contributor Covenant, version 2.1** as its code of
conduct. The full text and enforcement guidelines are published here:

<https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/>

In short: be respectful, welcoming, and constructive. Personal attacks and
abusive behavior are not tolerated, in issues, pull requests, or any other
project space.

## Reporting

Concerns can be reported privately to the maintainer:

- via this repository's **Security** tab (**Report a vulnerability**), or
- by contacting **@maferick** on GitHub.

Reports will be reviewed and handled confidentially.
